title: Garlic Fried Rice
description: A simple Chinese dish made with stir-fried rice, garlic, and other ingredients. This recipe is easy to make and requires minimal ingredients.
instructions: Heat the oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the minced garlic and stir-fry until fragrant.
Add the cooked rice to the wok or skillet and stir-fry for 2-3 minutes.
Add the chopped scallions and stir-fry for another minute.
Serve the garlic fried rice hot.
